query:
-- Disney World trip for Sarah Mitchell (id=2)
INSERT INTO trips (userId, title, destination, coverImageUrl, startDate, endDate, status, notes, confirmationCode, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  2,
  'Mitchell Family Disney World Adventure',
  'Walt Disney World, Orlando, FL',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605833556294-ea5c7a74f57d?w=1280&q=80',
  '2026-06-14 00:00:00',
  '2026-06-21 00:00:00',
  'confirmed',
  'Full 7-night stay at Disney''s Polynesian Village Resort. Park tickets for Magic Kingdom, EPCOT, Hollywood Studios, and Animal Kingdom. Dining plan included.',
  'NCT-DIS-2026-0614',
  NOW(), NOW()
);

-- Norwegian Cruise for Linda Johnson (id=3)
INSERT INTO trips (userId, title, destination, coverImageUrl, startDate, endDate, status, notes, confirmationCode, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  3,
  'Caribbean Cruise — Norwegian Encore',
  'Eastern Caribbean: St. Thomas, Nassau, Great Stirrup Cay',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548574505-5e239809ee19?w=1280&q=80',
  '2026-09-07 00:00:00',
  '2026-09-14 00:00:00',
  'confirmed',
  '7-night Eastern Caribbean cruise aboard Norwegian Encore. Balcony cabin on Deck 12. Unlimited dining package included.',
  'NCT-NCL-2026-0907',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
